init.title: Dreame A2 Mower options
init.description: Tune archive retention and the dock orientation used for compass-frame position sensors.

data.lidar_archive_keep: LiDAR scans to keep per map
data.lidar_archive_max_mb: LiDAR archive size cap (MB, per map)

data_description.lidar_archive_keep: Most-recent LiDAR scans retained per map before older ones are pruned.
data_description.lidar_archive_max_mb: Hard cap on per-map LiDAR archive size; older scans are pruned first.
data_description.session_archive_keep: Most-recent finalized mowing sessions retained on disk.
data_description.station_bearing_deg: Compass bearing (0-359, clockwise from north) of the dock's local X axis. Used to compute the position_north_m / position_east_m sensors. Leave at 0 if you don't use those sensors. CFG.DOCK.yaw is unreliable on this firmware, so set this manually.
